emails.subject: LNG Industry Reports
emails.body: LNG Industry Reports Paul, I was wondering if you are getting some LNG industry reports/analysis e.g. "LNG in World Markets" published by Poten Partners. If yes, would it be convenient for you to arrange a copy of the same for DPC? As I write this mail, the DPC lenders meet is still going on in Singapore. All of us are anxiously waiting to know the outcome. Regards, Shubh

emails.subject: RE: LNG Industry Reports
emails.body: RE: LNG Industry Reports Shubh, The only publication that I have been getting is World Gas Intelligence published by Energy Intelligence Group. I can FAX you my latest copy if you are interested. Also, they have a web site: <URL> Poten Partners' main number in New York is 212 230-2000. Also, there is a sample issue of LNG in World Markets at <URL> I spoke with Lizette Valentin (Poten) and she says the lowest cost way for you to get the publication is to be added on to Clay Harris's subscription for $500/year. Lizette's number is 212 230-2086. The website also has the form that you need to fill out to get added on to Clay's subscription. Call me and we can look at the website together. I am also anxious to get some news regarding the lenders' meeting in Singapore. Take Care, Paul To: Y'Barbo, Paul

emails.subject: FW: LNG Industry Reports
emails.body: FW: LNG Industry Reports Shubh, When you get to the Poten Home Page, do the following: click "click here to continue" point to "services" click "LNG" click "Reports Analysis" click "Order" click "LNG in World Markets" print the form that comes up Let me know if you need anything further. Paul To: Shrivastava, Shubh
